{{Quote|They signed on under General Antilles. If they had paid attention to him, most if not all of them would still be alive. If you want to know who betrayed your people to death, look to the commander who broke ranks.|[[Jagged Fel]], to [[Lensi]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''</ref>}}
'''''Coriolis''''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]]-crewed [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the latter stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was operated by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Yurf Col]].

It was part of a force commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] that was tasked with [[Battle of the Duro system|distracting]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces at [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], as part of a larger effort to [[Battle at Fondor|liberate]] [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. ''Coriolis'' was lost when it joined with several other warships and Duros freedom fighters in refusing an order to fall back.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
